name: Caribbean Chicken
recipeIngredient: Broiler-fryer chickens (about 2 lb each), cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, melt 1 cup butter over low heat.
2. Stir in 1/3 cup lemon or lime juice and Italian seasoning.
3. Add salt, garlic, dry mustard, and pepper; stir to combine.
4. Season each side of the chicken halves with salt and pepper.
5. Place the chicken on the grill skin side up and brush with herb butter.
6. Grill about 4 to 5 inches from medium coals until the chicken is tender (about 1 hour).
7. Baste frequently and turn the chicken occasionally.
8. Meanwhile, combine marmalade with lemon or lime juice and butter in another saucepan.
9. Heat, stirring constantly, until melted.
10. About 4 minutes before the chicken is done, brush some of the marmalade mixture on each chicken half to glaze; grill for about 1 minute.
11. Turn the chicken and brush with the remaining marmalade mixture; grill for about 1 more minute.
12. Makes 6 servings.
Shared by Judi M. Phelps.
